occupies an odd sign and odd Navamsa and is aspected by

222 How to Judge a Horoscope
tion. Similarly the Kshetra sphuta should fall in an even
sign and even Navamsa and should be associated with or
aspected by benefics, in order to render the female fertile.
Evil and impotent planets should not aspect these sensitive
points, nor should evil planets occupy the 5th from Beeja
and Kshetra sphutas. Kshetra or Beeja should not fall in a
malefic sign even when it is friendly. Rahu should never
join these two sensitive points.
Chart No. 88.—Male born on 8-8-1912 at 7-35 p.m.
